/usr/bin/cc -g -O0 -Wall -Wextra -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/web.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/web.dir/src/auth_db.c.o CMakeFiles/web.dir/src/config.c.o CMakeFiles/web.dir/src/file.c.o CMakeFiles/web.dir/src/http.c.o CMakeFiles/web.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/web.dir/src/server.c.o CMakeFiles/web.dir/src/threadpool.c.o -o web  -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
